nodes.label: Copilot Caveman Rules
nodes.rationale: Respond terse like smart caveman. All technical substance stays, only fluff dies. Drop articles, filler, pleasantries, hedging.

nodes.label: Chat Input Closure Bug Fix
nodes.rationale: Fixed stale isLoading state capture in useCallback using useRef guard pattern and a 30-second timeout safety net.

nodes.label: SSE First with Polling Fallback
nodes.rationale: Uses EventSource for real-time query stream, falling back to 5-second polling if SSE connection fails or times out (3 seconds).

nodes.label: Heatmap Click-to-Filter
nodes.rationale: Allows staff operators to click stadium gates to filter live query streams.

nodes.label: Staff Stadium Operations Dashboard Implementation Plan
D1 - Real Sources Ingestion
nodes.rationale: Ingests phone events only (no simulation) via POST /api/track/event.

nodes.label: D3 - Event-Based Tracking over GPS
nodes.rationale: Tracks geofence transitions and BLE beacon encounters rather than continuous GPS streams to protect privacy and save battery.

nodes.label: D9 - Confidence Gating & Privacy
nodes.rationale: Shows 'Follow Steward Directions' when confidence is low instead of guessing route. Pseudonymizes user data and auto-expires raw logs in 24h.

nodes.label: D10 - Capacity-Based Egress Staggering
nodes.rationale: Staggers egress post-match by assigning leave-windows based on gate capacity throughput sinks.

nodes.label: Landing Page Screenshot
nodes.rationale: Uses a dark-mode theme with dot-grid pattern, prominent golden trophy icon, bold typographic layout, and a green-to-orange gradient to highlight 'MANAGEMENT SUITE'. The CTA button features a green gradient and a keyboard shortcut icon (⌘) indicating a modern, keyboard-navigable tournament operations dashboard.

nodes.label: Fan Egress Portal Screen
nodes.rationale: Renders the Fan Egress Portal UI in dark mode. Showcases match status (USA 2-1 MEX, 88' Live +4 min stoppage), System status (Operational), Matchday telemetry status (Gate A OPEN, Main Hub wait time 8 MIN with next shuttle in 2M, Weather current OPTIMAL), log feed ticker (Fan Query Stream), and the Fan Support Assistant chat interface (Encrypted).

nodes.label: Fan Egress Portal Layout
nodes.rationale: Three-tiered card hierarchy: matchday live status telemetry at the top, a live scroll of fan queries in the middle, and the AI support bot interface at the bottom. Follows a premium dark dashboard aesthetic with emerald accenting.

nodes.label: Dark Theme UI Aesthetic with High-Contrast Green Accents
Fan Deferral UI Screenshot
nodes.rationale: Shows the visual layout and key features of the Fan Egress Portal, demonstrating real-time statuses like Primary Entry, Transit Network, and Environment, alongside a Server-Sent Events (SSE) query stream.

nodes.label: Server-Sent Events
nodes.rationale: Used for streaming real-time event updates to the Fan Query Stream on the UI.

nodes.label: Fan Tab Screenshot
nodes.rationale: Shows the Fan Portal's AI Copilot chatbot interface, rendered on a dark backdrop with a custom dotted grid. Highlights system status messages, input options, and quick-action query triggers.

nodes.label: Fan AI Copilot Chat Interface
nodes.rationale: A natural language conversational interface for fans to query tournament databases, telemetry metrics, and logistics information using a chat stream.

nodes.label: Security Status Action Button
nodes.rationale: Quick-action query input for displaying real-time security events and alerts in the stadium.

nodes.label: Gate Capacity Action Button
nodes.rationale: Quick-action query input for checking gate occupancy, wait times, and open/closed gate status.

nodes.label: Transit Alerts Action Button
nodes.rationale: Quick-action query input for requesting transportation status, shuttles, and light rail delays.

nodes.label: Staff Ops Deck UI Layout
nodes.rationale: Dashboard interface designed for stadium operations staff to monitor match day events, egress flow, transit network, and enforce capacity gates.

nodes.label: Spatial Congestion Heatmap Component
nodes.rationale: Visualizes the field of play and gates A, B, C, D using color-coded status (Normal vs Warning) to quickly identify bottleneck areas during egress.

nodes.label: Tactical Insights Component
nodes.rationale: Provides actionable suggestions (e.g. auxiliary turnstile activation at Gate C) based on real-time sensor and flow data.

nodes.label: Enforcement and Alerts Component
nodes.rationale: Displays warning prompts for low data confidence with quick-action buttons to 'defer to stewards' or manually trigger capacity gate enforcement.

nodes.label: Fan Query Stream Component
nodes.rationale: SSE-powered feed displaying live topics (e.g., Transit alerts, Gate capacity) being queried or discussed by fans.

nodes.label: Staff Ops Deck UI
nodes.rationale: Real-time operations dashboard for staff members to manage stadium egress, monitor pulse indicators, and view tactical insights.

nodes.label: Live Stadium Pulse
nodes.rationale: Key metrics panel tracking Primary Entry (Gate A), Transit Network (Main Hub), and Environment (Current status).

nodes.label: Spatial Congestion Heatmap
nodes.rationale: Visual map demonstrating layout, connections, and congestion status between Gate A and Gate B.

nodes.label: Tactical Insights
nodes.rationale: Operator recommendations to alleviate egress pressure, such as opening auxiliary turnstiles at Gate C.
